en-US.description: DUKI /djuːki/ is an acronym for Decentralized Universal Kindness Income, a concept advocated by AllLivesMatter.World. It envisions that those who participate in real-world deals generate kindness tokens, which are distributed equally to all verified humans. Kindness begets kindness — every deal you make supports everyone, and everyone's participation supports you. No whales, no bots — just people. Claim your share each round and be part of a kinder, mutually rewarding economy.

en-GB.description: DUKI /djuːki/ is an acronym for Decentralised Universal Kindness Income, a concept advocated by AllLivesMatter.World. It envisions that those who participate in real-world deals generate kindness tokens, which are distributed equally to all verified humans. Kindness begets kindness — every deal you make supports everyone, and everyone's participation supports you. No whales, no bots — just people. Claim your share each round and be part of a kinder, mutually rewarding economy.

zh-CN.description: DUKI /djuːki/ 是 Decentralized Universal Kindness Income 的缩写，即普世上善收入，由 AllLivesMatter.World 倡导。其愿景是：参与上善交易的人创造善意代币，平等分配给所有经过验证的真实人类。善意生善意——你的每笔交易惠及所有人，所有人的参与也在支持你。没有巨鲸、没有机器人——只有人。每轮领取你的份额，共建一个爱为道、交互利的新经济。

zh-TW.description: DUKI /djuːki/ 是 Decentralized Universal Kindness Income 的縮寫，即普世上善收入，由 AllLivesMatter.World 倡議。其願景是：參與上善交易的人創造善意代幣，平等分配給所有經過驗證的真實人類。善意生善意——你的每筆交易惠及所有人，所有人的參與也在支持你。沒有巨鯨、沒有機器人——只有人。每輪領取你的份額，共建一個愛為道、交互利的新經濟。
